zh.lifeSummary: 當James Thompson於1520年出生在蘇格蘭藍納可爾布蘭太爾時，他的父親Sir Andrew M Thompson27歲，母親Lady Isabella Normond Wilson17歲。他於1538年與Lady Marion Cochran在蘇格蘭費伏登福姆林結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他於1535年住在蘇格蘭費伏登福姆林。他去世於1611年3月27日在蘇格蘭藍納可爾格拉斯哥享年91歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可斯特普尼聖 登斯坦 安德 哥吉拉 沙智 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当James Thompson于1520年出生在苏格兰藍納可爾布蘭太爾时，他的父亲Sir Andrew M Thompson27岁，母亲Lady Isabella Normond Wilson17岁。他于1538年与Lady Marion Cochran在苏格兰費伏登福姆林结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他于1535年住在苏格兰費伏登福姆林。他去世于1611年3月27日在苏格兰藍納可爾格拉斯哥享年91岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可斯特普尼聖 登斯坦 安德 哥吉拉 沙智 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Thompson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name T(h)om(me) (see Thom ) + -son ‘son of Tom’. Thomson is usually the Scottish form, that with the intrusive -p- being English. Both forms are common in Ireland. The surname Thompson is also very common among African Americans.
Americanized form of Danish, Norwegian, and North German Thomsen and of its Swedish cognate Thomsson. Compare Thomson .

variants.name: Thomson
meanings: Scottish, English and northern Irish: variant of   Thompson  .
Scottish: sometimes an Anglicized form of Gaelic McThomas; see McTavish , McComish .
Americanized form of Danish, Norwegian, and North German   Thomsen  . Compare   Thompson  .

variants.name: Thom
meanings: Scottish and English: from the Middle English personal name T(h)om(me), a pet form of Thomas . In Scotland, Thom is also an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Thom, see McComb .
German: from the personal name Thom, a pet form of Thomas . This surname is also found in France.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 譚, see   Tan   1.

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When James Thompson was born in 1520, in Blantyre, Lanarkshire, Scotland, his father, Sir Andrew M Thompson, was 27 and his mother, Lady Isabella Normond Wilson, was 17. He married Lady Marion Cochran in 1538, in Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 7 daughters. He lived in Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland in 1535. He died on 27 March 1611, in Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland, at the age of 91, and was buried in Saint Dunstan and All Saints Church, Stepney, Middlesex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque James Thompson est né en 1520, à Blantyre, Lanarkshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Andrew M Thompson, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Lady Isabella Normond Wilson, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Lady Marion Cochran en 1538, à Dunfermline, Fife, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 7 filles. Il a vécu à Dunfermline, Fife, Écosse en 1535. Il est décédé le 27 mars 1611, à Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 91 ans, et a été enterré à Saint Dunstan and All Saints Church, Stepney, Middlesex, Angleterre.

Er hat 1538 in Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland Lady Marion Cochran geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 7 Töchter. 1535 hat er in Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland gelebt. Er starb am 27. März 1611 im Alter von 91 Jahren in Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland und wurde in Saint Dunstan and All Saints Church, Stepney, Middlesex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando James Thompson è nato il nel 1520 nel Blantyre, Lanarkshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir Andrew M Thompson, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Lady Isabella Normond Wilson, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Lady Marion Cochran nel 1538, nel Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 7 figlie. Vissuto a Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland nel 1535. Morì il 27 marzo 1611, nel Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland, all'età di 91 anni, e fu sepolto a Saint Dunstan and All Saints Church, Stepney, Middlesex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: James Thompsonが1520年にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアブラントイアで生まれた時，父Sir Andrew M Thompsonは27歳，母Lady Isabella Normond Wilsonは17歳であった。1538年にスコットランドフィフダンフエルムラインでLady Marion Cochranと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1535年にはスコットランドフィフダンフエルムラインに住んでいた。彼は1611年3月27日にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアグラスゴウで91歳で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスステプニーサイント ダンスタン アンド アル サインツ チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint Dunstan and All Saints Church, Ste: 영국 미들레세스 스테p니 세인트 던스탠 앤드 앨 세인츠 c후르치

ko.lifeSummary: James Thompson(이)가 1520년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 블랜티어에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Andrew M Thompson(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Isabella Normond Wilson(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1538년 스컷랜드 피프 던퍼라이인에서 Lady Marion Cochran(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 1535년도에 스컷랜드 피프 던퍼라이인에서 살았다. 그는 1611년 3월 27일 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 글라스고에서 91세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 스테p니 세인트 던스탠 앤드 앨 세인츠 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando James Thompson nasceu em 1520, em Blantyre, Lanarkshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Andrew M Thompson, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Lady Isabella Normond Wilson, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Marion Cochran em 1538, em Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele viveu em Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland em 1535. Ele faleceu em 27 de março de 1611, em Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland, com 91 anos, e foi sepultado em Saint Dunstan and All Saints Church, Stepney, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда James Thompson родился в 1520 г. в местности блантир, ланаркшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir Andrew M Thompson было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Isabella Normond Wilson, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Marion Cochran в 1538 г. в местности дунфирмлаин, фиф, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Он жил в местности дунфирмлаин, фиф, Шотландия в 1535 году. Он умер 27 марта 1611 г. в местности гласгоу, ланаркшир, Шотландия в возрасте 91 год и был похоронен в местности сеинт дунстань анд алл сеинц чурч, степни, миддлесекс, Англия.
